review_text: I AM FURIOUS. This CoolAir AC unit CAUGHT FIRE after 3 days. My living room has smoke damage. I've filed a safety complaint with consumer court and am taking legal action. This product is DANGEROUS. DO NOT BUY. Refund immediately or I will post this everywhere. 0/5.

scoring_notes.notes: urgency MUST be high — fire, legal action, safety complaint
